_comment: Scope: server logic (mimir) + the Asgard state machines (pure reducers/flows). Mutation only targets code with a unit harness — mutating code no test exercises just yields guaranteed survivors. Skipped: channel.ts (Bun.serve + MCP wiring), the argv entry main.ts, launcher.ts / runBuild.ts (their pure builders ARE unit-tested, but their Bun.spawn/lsof/git/fetch IO isn't, so mutating them is survivor noise), diff.ts (gh subprocess), and the bun:sqlite stores (*.sqlite.ts) + bun-only specs (*.buntest.ts) that can't run under vitest. This is a mutation-specific call, NOT the coverage exclude list: coverage (vitest.config.ts) measures launcher.ts/runBuild.ts honestly and only main.ts/channel.ts/diff.ts/bun-only files are coverage-excluded. The React components are exercised by the 100%-gated jsdom suite + the Playwright E2E. break is set below the measured baseline so the gate fails only on regressions; ratchet it up as survivors are killed.
